title: Software Engineering & Web Technologies (JNTUK R20)
description: JNTUK R20 Year 2-3 — Software Engineering covering SDLC, requirements, design, testing, and project management; Web Technologies covering HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js — aligned to JNTUK B.Tech CSE R20 syllabus.

modules.title: Getting Started
modules.description: Introduction and overview of Software Engineering & Web Technologies (JNTUK R20)

pages.title: Software Engineering & Web Tech — Course Overview
Software Engineering & Web Tech — Wiki Index

modules.title: Core Lectures
modules.description: All lectures and concept pages for this course

pages.title: SDLC Models: Waterfall, Agile, Scrum, Spiral, RAD — Comparison and Use Cases
Requirements Engineering: Functional vs Non-Functional, Use Cases, SRS Document
Software Design: Architectural Patterns, UML Diagrams, SOLID Principles
Design Patterns: Creational, Structural, Behavioral — GoF Patterns with Examples
Software Testing: Unit, Integration, System, UAT, Black-box, White-box, TDD
Software Metrics: LOC, Function Points, Cyclomatic Complexity, COCOMO Model
Agile and Scrum: Sprints, User Stories, Backlog, Velocity, CI/CD Pipelines
HTML5 and CSS3: Semantic Tags, Flexbox, Grid, Responsive Design, Media Queries
JavaScript Fundamentals: DOM, Events, ES6+ Features, Async/Await, Fetch API
React.js Introduction: Components, Props, State, Hooks, Virtual DOM
Node.js and Express.js: REST APIs, Middleware, Authentication, MongoDB CRUD
Web Security: XSS, CSRF, SQL Injection, HTTPS, JWT, OAuth2

modules.title: Practice
modules.description: Practice, quizzes, coding, and project pages

pages.title: Web Technologies Lab: Build a Full Stack Student Portal using React + Node.js
Placement Guide: Software Engineering & Web Tech Interview for JNTUK Students
